mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appeal (student_id, course_id, course_name, reason, appeal_time, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{reason}, #{appealTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM appeal WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY appeal_time DESC
SELECT a.*, u.real_name as student_name, u.username as student_username FROM appeal a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.student_id = u.id WHERE a.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY a.appeal_time DESC
SELECT a.*, u.real_name as student_name, u.username as student_username FROM appeal a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.student_id = u.id ORDER BY a.appeal_time DESC
SELECT * FROM appeal WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM appeal WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId}
